nodes.name: Bolivian antpitta
nodes.summary: Bolivian antpitta（Bolivian antpitta，学名 Grallaria cochabambae），常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found at elevations of 2,950–3,500 m. Its preferred habitat is humid montane forest and it prefers the understory and forest floor. The Bolivian antpitta is protected in some parts of its range including in Amboró National Park, Bolivia.{{Cite journal|last1=Chesser|first1=R
